name: Value share
description: An agent-based energy community model integrating household electricity consumption, renewable energy sources, centralized heat pumps for heating, and electric vehicle charging infrastructure. The model distributes community-level savings using a Value Share mechanism and evaluates optimal operational scenarios from Scenario A (basic communal generation) to Scenario F (local energy market trading) using a multi-criteria objective function.
objective: Maximize the multi-criteria strategy function of the energy community by optimizing cost savings, self-consumption, self-sustainability, fairness of value share distribution, CO2 emission reductions, and payback period across different operational scenarios.

symbols.name: Timestamp
symbols.definition: Date and time of the measurement interval

symbols.name: member_id
symbols.definition: Unique identifier of the community member

symbols.name: member_type
symbols.definition: Type of the community member (e.g. residential)

symbols.name: CP_i_t
symbols.definition: Individual baseload electricity consumption of member i at timestep t

symbols.name: G_i_t
symbols.definition: Individual solar generation of member i at timestep t

symbols.name: ToU_t
symbols.definition: Time-of-Use electricity purchase tariff rate at timestep t

symbols.name: FiT_t
symbols.definition: Feed-in Tariff rate for surplus electricity injected into the grid at timestep t

symbols.name: Gas_Price
symbols.definition: Unit price of natural gas for conventional heating

symbols.name: Petrol_Price
symbols.definition: Unit price of petrol/gasoline for conventional transport

symbols.name: UC_PV
symbols.definition: Unit capital cost of installing solar PV systems

symbols.name: UC_HP
symbols.definition: Total procurement and installation cost of the community heat pump

symbols.name: UC_EVCS
symbols.definition: Total installation cost of communal Level 3 EV fast charging stations

symbols.name: Y_spec
symbols.definition: Specific PV system energy yield per year in the given location

symbols.name: m
symbols.definition: Total number of members in the energy community

symbols.name: V_i
symbols.definition: Average heated volume of a single member housing unit

symbols.name: k_ins
symbols.definition: Thermal insulation coefficient of building envelopes

symbols.name: T_in
symbols.definition: Standard target indoor comfort temperature

symbols.name: T_out_t
symbols.definition: Outdoor ambient temperature time series at timestep t

symbols.name: COP
symbols.definition: Coefficient of Performance of heat pump systems

symbols.name: fuel_cons
symbols.definition: Average fuel consumption rate of conventional vehicles (epsilon)

symbols.name: km_365
symbols.definition: Average total annual driving distance per household member

symbols.name: EC_EV
symbols.definition: Average electricity consumption rate of an electric vehicle

symbols.name: eta_EV
symbols.definition: Efficiency of electric vehicle charging systems

symbols.name: EF_el
symbols.definition: CO2 emission factor of electricity imported from the national grid

symbols.name: EF_H
symbols.definition: CO2 emission factor of natural gas used for conventional heating

symbols.name: EF_T
symbols.definition: CO2 emission factor of petrol/gasoline fuel

symbols.name: I_HP
symbols.definition: Scenario selector flag indicating activation of centralized heating electrification (Scenario C/E/F = 1, otherwise 0)

symbols.name: I_EV
symbols.definition: Scenario selector flag indicating activation of EV transportation electrification (Scenario D/E/F = 1, otherwise 0)

symbols.name: I_LEM
symbols.definition: Scenario selector flag indicating local energy market trading activation (Scenario F = 1, otherwise 0)

symbols.name: P_LEM_t
symbols.definition: Local energy market clearing price at timestep t

symbols.name: omega_1
symbols.definition: Weight of Fairness Index in the multi-criteria strategy evaluation

symbols.name: omega_2
symbols.definition: Weight of Cost Savings in the multi-criteria strategy evaluation

symbols.name: omega_3
symbols.definition: Weight of Self-Sustainability Index in the multi-criteria strategy evaluation

symbols.name: omega_4
symbols.definition: Weight of Self-Consumption Index in the multi-criteria strategy evaluation

symbols.name: omega_5
symbols.definition: Weight of Grid Dependence Index in the multi-criteria strategy evaluation

symbols.name: omega_6
symbols.definition: Weight of inverse payback period in the multi-criteria strategy evaluation

symbols.name: omega_7
symbols.definition: Weight of CO2 Reduction Index in the multi-criteria strategy evaluation

symbols.name: C_EC_t
symbols.definition: Total electricity consumption of shared/communal assets in the community at timestep t

symbols.name: G_EC_t
symbols.definition: Electricity generation profile of shared/communal PV installations at timestep t

symbols.name: C_sh_t
symbols.definition: Equally shared communal consumption allocated to each member at timestep t

symbols.name: G_sh_t
symbols.definition: Equally shared communal generation allocated to each member at timestep t

symbols.name: Q_H_i_t
symbols.definition: Thermal heating demand of member i at timestep t calculated based on building thermal dynamics

symbols.name: CH_i_t
symbols.definition: Electricity load required for heating of member i at timestep t (non-zero only if I_HP is enabled)

symbols.name: CEV_i_t
symbols.definition: Electricity load required for EV charging of member i at timestep t (non-zero only if I_EV is enabled)

symbols.name: C_i_t
symbols.definition: Total combined electricity load of member i at timestep t

symbols.name: D_i_t
symbols.definition: Net electricity import demand of member i from the community/grid at timestep t

symbols.name: S_i_t
symbols.definition: Net surplus electricity generated by member i at timestep t

symbols.name: D_EC_t
symbols.definition: Aggregated net community electricity deficit imported from the macro-grid at timestep t

symbols.name: S_EC_t
symbols.definition: Aggregated net community surplus electricity injected into the macro-grid at timestep t

symbols.name: QB_i_t
symbols.definition: Quantity of electricity deficit of member i cleared/bought on the local energy market at timestep t (non-zero only if I_LEM is enabled)

symbols.name: QS_i_t
symbols.definition: Quantity of electricity surplus of member i cleared/sold on the local energy market at timestep t (non-zero only if I_LEM is enabled)

symbols.name: Cost_H_i
symbols.definition: Annual conventional fossil-fuel heating costs per member (zeroed out if electric heating is active)

symbols.name: Cost_T_i
symbols.definition: Annual conventional petrol vehicle transportation costs per member (zeroed out if electric transport is active)

symbols.name: Pay_EC_0
symbols.definition: Total baseline costs of the community prior to the energy community transformation

symbols.name: Pay_EC
symbols.definition: Post-intervention aggregated cost of the energy community

symbols.name: Pay_i
symbols.definition: Individual net energy bill of member i before receiving value share distributions

symbols.name: VS_EC
symbols.definition: Aggregate financial value surplus generated within the community as a benefit of internal resource sharing

symbols.name: VS_i
symbols.definition: Value Share benefit distributed back to member i based on individual and communal participation dynamics

symbols.name: Pay_i_final
symbols.definition: Final effective bill paid by member i after receiving Value Share allocations

symbols.name: P_PV
symbols.definition: Required sizing capacity of community photovoltaic installations based on load expectations

symbols.name: Cost_EC
symbols.definition: Total community-funded capital expenditure (CAPEX) investment cost

symbols.name: PBP_EC
symbols.definition: Payback period of the community energy system investment

symbols.name: Gu_EC_t
symbols.definition: Amount of generated energy instantly used internally by community load at timestep t

symbols.name: CO2_EC_0
symbols.definition: Total baseline CO2 greenhouse gas emissions of the community prior to transformation

symbols.name: delta_CO2_H
symbols.definition: Avoided CO2 emissions due to gas heating electrification with highly efficient centralized heat pumps

symbols.name: delta_CO2_EV
symbols.definition: Avoided CO2 emissions from substituting internal combustion engine cars with electric vehicles

symbols.name: delta_CO2
symbols.definition: Total avoided aggregate greenhouse gas emissions of the energy community

symbols.name: CS_EC
symbols.definition: Percentage cost savings achieved by the community after forming the EC

symbols.name: GDI_EC
symbols.definition: Grid Dependence Index measuring proportion of community demand satisfied from external grid imports

symbols.name: SCI_EC
symbols.definition: Self-Consumption Index quantifying fraction of local RES generation used locally within the community

symbols.name: SSI_EC
symbols.definition: Self-Sustainability Index measuring fraction of total community energy usage generated by local RES

symbols.name: FI_EC
symbols.definition: Fairness Index evaluating equity of distributed value benefits among individual prosumers and consumers

symbols.name: CO2_red_index
symbols.definition: Normalized percentage emission reduction achieved across energy, heating and transport sectors

symbols.name: f_EC
symbols.definition: Multi-criteria objective performance rating of the selected energy community operational scenario

symbols.name: I_ind_cov
symbols.definition: Scenario selector flag indicating whether individual household consumption is covered by the community PV system (1 for Scenarios B/C/D/E/F, 0 for Scenario A)

parameters.definition: Time-of-Use electricity purchase tariff rate at timestep t

parameters.name: FiT_t
parameters.definition: Feed-in Tariff rate for surplus electricity injected into the grid at timestep t

parameters.name: Gas_Price
parameters.definition: Unit price of natural gas for conventional heating

parameters.name: Petrol_Price

parameters.name: UC_HP

parameters.name: UC_EVCS

parameters.name: m
parameters.definition: Total number of members in the energy community

parameters.name: V_i
parameters.definition: Average heated volume of a single member housing unit

parameters.name: k_ins
parameters.definition: Thermal insulation coefficient of building envelopes

parameters.name: T_in

parameters.name: COP

parameters.name: fuel_cons

parameters.name: km_365

parameters.name: EC_EV

parameters.name: EF_el

parameters.name: EF_H

parameters.name: EF_T

parameters.name: omega_3

parameters.name: omega_4
parameters.definition: Weight of Self-Consumption Index in the multi-criteria strategy evaluation

parameters.name: omega_5
parameters.definition: Weight of Grid Dependence Index in the multi-criteria strategy evaluation

parameters.definition: Weight of inverse payback period in the multi-criteria strategy evaluation

parameters.name: I_ind_cov
parameters.definition: Scenario selector flag indicating whether individual household consumption is covered by the community PV system (1 for Scenarios B/C/D/E/F, 0 for Scenario A)

derived_variables.name: C_EC_t
derived_variables.definition: Communal baseload consumption calculated as a fraction of total community baseload (3%)

derived_variables.name: P_PV
derived_variables.definition: Photovoltaic system peak sizing derived from community baseload expectations and location yield

derived_variables.name: G_EC_t
derived_variables.definition: Communal solar generation profile generated by scaling normal individual solar profiles to PV peak capacity

derived_variables.name: C_sh_t
derived_variables.definition: Allocation of shared consumption profile per community member

derived_variables.name: G_sh_t
derived_variables.definition: Allocation of shared generation profile per community member

derived_variables.name: Q_H_i_t
derived_variables.definition: Standard heat requirement calculation based on volume, building insulation, comfort internal, and external temperatures

derived_variables.name: CH_i_t
derived_variables.definition: Electric load from electrified heating using heat pump COP if I_HP is enabled

derived_variables.name: CEV_i_t
derived_variables.definition: EV charging power demand profile across timeteps for active EV transition

derived_variables.name: C_i_t
derived_variables.definition: Aggregated individual demand containing domestic load, electric heating and EV charging loads

derived_variables.name: D_i_t
derived_variables.definition: Individual load importing behavior from the community local balance

derived_variables.name: S_i_t
derived_variables.definition: Individual generation excess profile in reference to total domestic load

derived_variables.name: D_EC_t
derived_variables.definition: Net community demand import curve in collective self-consumption mode

derived_variables.name: S_EC_t
derived_variables.definition: Net community export generation injection curve in collective self-consumption mode

derived_variables.name: QB_i_t
derived_variables.definition: Cleared bought quantities under LEM dynamic pricing

derived_variables.name: QS_i_t
derived_variables.definition: Cleared sold quantities under LEM dynamic pricing

derived_variables.name: Cost_H_i
derived_variables.definition: Conventional fossil fuel heating expenditure for non-electrified baseline scenario state

derived_variables.name: Cost_T_i
derived_variables.definition: Conventional internal combustion transportation expense

derived_variables.name: Pay_EC_0
derived_variables.definition: Calculated total financial baseline reference costs prior to any community measures

derived_variables.name: Pay_EC
derived_variables.definition: Consolidated energy system community cost after deployment of renewable assets and operations

derived_variables.name: Pay_i
derived_variables.definition: Prosumer/Consumer individual costs before redistribution of value share benefits

derived_variables.name: VS_EC
derived_variables.definition: Community residual cash value that represents internal financial savings of virtual net-metering structures

derived_variables.name: VS_i
derived_variables.definition: Allocation of the communal value share benefit evenly across individual players

derived_variables.name: Pay_i_final
derived_variables.definition: Calculated actual individual payment after applying Value Share allocation rebates

derived_variables.name: Cost_EC
derived_variables.definition: Aggregated upfront asset procurement capital cost

derived_variables.name: PBP_EC
derived_variables.definition: Financial period required to recover community CAPEX with internal operational cost reduction savings

derived_variables.name: Gu_EC_t
derived_variables.definition: Instantaneous internal usage profile of generated solar electricity within community system boundaries

derived_variables.name: CO2_EC_0
derived_variables.definition: Annual baseline CO2 emissions encompassing heating (gas), transport (petrol) and standard electricity grid inputs

derived_variables.name: delta_CO2_H
derived_variables.definition: Abated carbon emissions due to fossil fuel substitution for thermal heating using local renewable energy

derived_variables.name: delta_CO2_EV
derived_variables.definition: Abated carbon emissions through substitute electric cars running on green local PV generated power

derived_variables.name: delta_CO2
derived_variables.definition: Integrated sectoral carbon greenhouse gas reductions

metrics.name: CS_EC
metrics.definition: Cost Savings percentage over baseline state

metrics.name: GDI_EC
metrics.definition: Community index of grid supply reliance

metrics.name: SCI_EC
metrics.definition: Proportion of local solar resource consumed locally

metrics.name: SSI_EC
metrics.definition: Index representing total energy independence based on generation capacity

metrics.name: FI_EC
metrics.definition: Jain's index of fairness evaluating distribution uniformity of value share benefits

metrics.name: CO2_red_index
metrics.definition: Total relative community carbon mitigation metric

outputs.name: f_EC
outputs.definition: Multi-criteria objective performance rating of the selected energy community operational scenario

equations.expression: Pay_EC_0 = sum_t((C_EC_t + sum_i(CP_i_t)) * ToU_t) + sum_i(Cost_H_i + Cost_T_i)
Pay_EC = sum_t(D_EC_t * ToU_t - S_EC_t * FiT_t) + (1 - I_HP) * sum_i(Cost_H_i) + (1 - I_EV) * sum_i(Cost_T_i)
Cost_EC = P_PV * UC_PV + I_HP * UC_HP + I_EV * UC_EVCS
Pay_i = (1 - I_LEM) * sum_t(D_i_t * ToU_t - S_i_t * FiT_t) + I_LEM * sum_t(QB_i_t * P_LEM_t + (D_i_t - QB_i_t) * ToU_t - (QS_i_t * P_LEM_t + (S_i_t - QS_i_t) * FiT_t))
Q_H_i_t = V_i * max(0, T_in - T_out_t) * k_ins
CO2_EC_0 = sum_t(C_EC_t + sum_i(CP_i_t)) * EF_el + sum_i(sum_t(Q_H_i_t / 0.9)) * EF_H + m * (km_365 / 100) * fuel_cons * EF_T
delta_CO2_H = I_HP * (sum_i(sum_t(CH_i_t)) * COP * EF_H - sum_i(sum_t(max(0, CH_i_t - (G_i_t + G_sh_t)))) * EF_el)
delta_CO2_EV = I_EV * (m * (km_365 / 100) * fuel_cons * EF_T - sum_t(sum_i(max(0, CEV_i_t - (G_i_t + G_sh_t)))) * EF_el)
delta_CO2 = sum_t(G_EC_t + sum_i(G_i_t) - sum_i(CEV_i_t) - sum_i(CH_i_t)) * EF_el + delta_CO2_H + delta_CO2_EV
f_EC = omega_1 * FI_EC + omega_2 * CS_EC + omega_3 * SSI_EC + omega_4 * SCI_EC - omega_5 * GDI_EC + omega_6 * (1 / PBP_EC) * 100 + omega_7 * CO2_red_index

steps.name: Communal consumption profiles
pseudocode: for each timestep t:
C_EC_t[t] = 0.03 * sum_i(CP_i_t[i, t])

steps.name: Sizing PV capacity and shared generation
pseudocode: P_PV = sum_t(C_EC_t) / Y_spec
for each timestep t:
G_EC_t[t] = P_PV * mean_i(G_i_t[i, t] / max_t(G_i_t[i, t]))

steps.name: Communal resource distribution allocation
pseudocode: for each timestep t:
C_sh_t[t] = C_EC_t[t] / m
G_sh_t[t] = G_EC_t[t] / m

steps.name: Sector integration (heating and transport)
pseudocode: for each member i and timestep t:
Q_H_i_t[i, t] = V_i * max(0, T_in - T_out_t[t]) * k_ins
CH_i_t[i, t] = I_HP * (Q_H_i_t[i, t] / COP)
CEV_i_t[i, t] = I_EV * ((EC_EV / eta_EV) * (km_365 / 8760) / 100)

steps.name: Aggregate individual consumption
pseudocode: for each member i and timestep t:
C_i_t[i, t] = CP_i_t[i, t] + CH_i_t[i, t] + CEV_i_t[i, t]

steps.name: Fossil fuel reference costs
pseudocode: for each member i:
Cost_H_i[i] = (1 - I_HP) * sum_t((Q_H_i_t[i, t] / 0.9) * Gas_Price)
Cost_T_i[i] = (1 - I_EV) * ((km_365 / 100) * fuel_cons * Petrol_Price)

steps.name: Community balance modeling
pseudocode: for each member i and timestep t:
D_i_t[i, t] = max(0, C_i_t[i, t] + C_sh_t[t] - (G_i_t[i, t] + G_sh_t[t]))
S_i_t[i, t] = max(0, G_i_t[i, t] + G_sh_t[t] - (C_i_t[i, t] + C_sh_t[t]))
for each timestep t:
D_EC_t[t] = max(0, sum_i(D_i_t[i, t]) - sum_i(S_i_t[i, t]))
S_EC_t[t] = max(0, sum_i(S_i_t[i, t]) - sum_i(D_i_t[i, t]))

steps.name: Local Energy Market (LEM) execution
pseudocode: if I_LEM == 1:
for each timestep t:
aggregate_deficit = sum_i(D_i_t[i, t])
aggregate_surplus = sum_i(S_i_t[i, t])
for each member i:
QB_i_t[i, t] = D_i_t[i, t] * min(1, aggregate_surplus / aggregate_deficit)
QS_i_t[i, t] = S_i_t[i, t] * min(1, aggregate_deficit / aggregate_surplus)
else:
QB_i_t = matrix_of_zeros()
QS_i_t = matrix_of_zeros()

steps.name: Community and member payments
pseudocode: Pay_EC_0 = sum_t((C_EC_t[t] + sum_i(CP_i_t[i, t])) * ToU_t[t]) + sum_i(Cost_H_i[i] + Cost_T_i[i])
Pay_EC = sum_t(D_EC_t[t] * ToU_t[t] - S_EC_t[t] * FiT_t[t]) + (1 - I_HP) * sum_i(Cost_H_i[i]) + (1 - I_EV) * sum_i(Cost_T_i[i])
for each member i:

Pay_i[i] = (1 - I_LEM) * sum_t(D_i_t[i, t] * ToU_t[t] - S_i_t[i, t] * FiT_t[t]) + I_LEM * sum_t(QB_i_t[i, t] * P_LEM_t[t] + (D_i_t[i, t] - QB_i_t[i, t]) * ToU_t[t] - (QS_i_t[i, t] * P_LEM_t[t] + (S_i_t[i, t] - QS_i_t[i, t]) * FiT_t[t]))

steps.name: Value sharing redistribution
pseudocode: VS_EC = sum_i(Pay_i[i]) - Pay_EC
for each member i:
VS_i[i] = VS_EC / m
Pay_i_final[i] = Pay_i[i] - VS_i[i]

steps.name: Investment modeling and payback period
pseudocode: Cost_EC = P_PV * UC_PV + I_HP * UC_HP + I_EV * UC_EVCS
PBP_EC = Cost_EC / (Pay_EC_0 - Pay_EC)

steps.name: Direct PV self-consumption
pseudocode: for each timestep t:
Gu_EC_t[t] = min(C_EC_t[t] + sum_i(C_i_t[i, t]), G_EC_t[t] + sum_i(G_i_t[i, t]))

steps.name: Sector environmental mitigation
pseudocode: CO2_EC_0 = sum_t(C_EC_t[t] + sum_i(CP_i_t[i, t])) * EF_el + sum_i(sum_t(Q_H_i_t[i, t] / 0.9)) * EF_H + m * (km_365 / 100) * fuel_cons * EF_T
delta_CO2_H = I_HP * (sum_i(sum_t(CH_i_t[i, t])) * COP * EF_H - sum_i(sum_t(max(0, CH_i_t[i, t] - (G_i_t[i, t] + G_sh_t[t])))) * EF_el)
delta_CO2_EV = I_EV * (m * (km_365 / 100) * fuel_cons * EF_T - sum_t(sum_i(max(0, CEV_i_t[i, t] - (G_i_t[i, t] + G_sh_t[t])))) * EF_el)
delta_CO2 = sum_t(G_EC_t[t] + sum_i(G_i_t[i, t]) - sum_i(CEV_i_t[i, t]) - sum_i(CH_i_t[i, t])) * EF_el + delta_CO2_H + delta_CO2_EV

steps.name: Indices and KPI scorecard calculation
pseudocode: CS_EC = ((Pay_EC_0 - Pay_EC) / Pay_EC_0) * 100
GDI_EC = (sum_t(D_EC_t) / sum_t(C_EC_t + sum_i(C_i_t))) * 100
SCI_EC = (sum_t(Gu_EC_t) / sum_t(G_EC_t + sum_i(G_i_t))) * 100
SSI_EC = (sum_t(Gu_EC_t) / sum_t(C_EC_t + sum_i(C_i_t))) * 100
for each member i, normalized_share[i] = VS_i[i] / (sum_t(G_i_t[i, t]) + sum_t(G_sh_t[t]))
FI_EC = (1 / m) * ((sum_i(normalized_share[i]))^2 / sum_i(normalized_share[i]^2)) * 100
CO2_red_index = (delta_CO2 / CO2_EC_0) * 100

steps.name: Objective function assessment
pseudocode: f_EC = omega_1 * FI_EC + omega_2 * CS_EC + omega_3 * SSI_EC + omega_4 * SCI_EC - omega_5 * GDI_EC + omega_6 * (1 / PBP_EC) * 100 + omega_7 * CO2_red_index

input_mapping.transformation_needed: Pivot raw DataFrame to wide format with Timestamp as index and member_id as columns representing CP_i_t.
Pivot raw DataFrame to wide format with Timestamp as index and member_id as columns representing G_i_t.
Extract 1D series aligned with Timestamp index to represent outdoor temperature.

tariff_mapping.how_to_align_with_Timestamp_hour: Align tariff with Timestamp index by matching hour-of-day.
Align tariff with Timestamp index by matching hour-of-day.
Align clearing prices with Timestamp index by matching hour-of-day.

pseudocode: Step 1: Compute shared/communal electricity consumption profile: C_EC_t = 0.03 * CP_i_t.sum(axis=1)
Step 2: Compute thermal heating demand profile Q_H_i_t: Q_H_i_t = V_i * k_ins * np.maximum(0, T_in - T_out_t) for each member i. Expand T_out_t across all timesteps.
Step 3: Compute electricity load required for heating CH_i_t: CH_i_t = I_HP * (Q_H_i_t / COP)
Step 4: Compute electricity load required for EV charging CEV_i_t: CEV_i_t = I_EV * ((EC_EV / eta_EV) * (km_365 / 8760) / 100) across all timesteps for each member i.
Step 5: Compute total combined individual load: C_i_t = CP_i_t + CH_i_t + CEV_i_t
Step 6: Compute PV system sizing peak capacity P_PV: P_PV = sum_t(C_EC_t + I_ind_cov * C_i_t.sum(axis=1)) / Y_spec
Step 7: Compute communal generation profile G_EC_t: G_EC_t = P_PV * G_i_t.mean(axis=1) / G_i_t.mean(axis=1).max()
Step 8: Compute shared communal profiles allocated per member: C_sh_t = C_EC_t / m, G_sh_t = G_EC_t / m

Step 9: Compute net electricity import D_i_t and surplus S_i_t per member: D_i_t = np.maximum(0, C_i_t + I_ind_cov * C_sh_t - (G_i_t + I_ind_cov * G_sh_t)), S_i_t = np.maximum(0, G_i_t + I_ind_cov * G_sh_t - (C_i_t + I_ind_cov * C_sh_t))

Step 10: Compute community balance deficit D_EC_t and surplus S_EC_t: D_EC_t = I_ind_cov * np.maximum(0, D_i_t.sum(axis=1) - S_i_t.sum(axis=1)) + (1 - I_ind_cov) * np.maximum(0, C_EC_t - G_EC_t), S_EC_t = I_ind_cov * np.maximum(0, S_i_t.sum(axis=1) - D_i_t.sum(axis=1)) + (1 - I_ind_cov) * np.maximum(0, G_EC_t - C_EC_t)

Step 11: Execute Local Energy Market (LEM) trading if active: if I_LEM == 1, QB_i_t = D_i_t * np.minimum(1, S_i_t.sum(axis=1) / D_i_t.sum(axis=1)), QS_i_t = S_i_t * np.minimum(1, D_i_t.sum(axis=1) / S_i_t.sum(axis=1)). Else, QB_i_t = 0, QS_i_t = 0.

Step 12: Compute conventional fossil fuel reference costs Cost_H_i and Cost_T_i: Cost_H_i = (1 - I_HP) * sum_t((Q_H_i_t / 0.9) * Gas_Price), Cost_T_i = (1 - I_EV) * ((km_365 / 100) * fuel_cons * Petrol_Price) per member i.
Step 13: Compute baseline payment Pay_EC_0: Pay_EC_0 = sum_t((C_EC_t + CP_i_t.sum(axis=1)) * ToU_t) + Cost_H_i.sum() + Cost_T_i.sum()

Step 14: Compute community consolidated post-intervention cost Pay_EC: Pay_EC = sum_t(D_EC_t * ToU_t - S_EC_t * FiT_t + (1 - I_ind_cov) * C_i_t.sum(axis=1) * ToU_t) + (1 - I_HP) * Cost_H_i.sum() + (1 - I_EV) * Cost_T_i.sum()

Step 15: Compute member individual payment Pay_i: Pay_i = sum_t( (1-I_LEM) * (D_i_t * ToU_t - S_i_t * FiT_t) + I_LEM * (QB_i_t * P_LEM_t + (D_i_t - QB_i_t) * ToU_t - (QS_i_t * P_LEM_t + (S_i_t - QS_i_t) * FiT_t)) )
Step 16: Compute community shared value distribution VS_EC, VS_i and Pay_i_final: VS_EC = I_ind_cov * (Pay_i.sum() - Pay_EC), VS_i = VS_EC / m, Pay_i_final = Pay_i - VS_i
Step 17: Compute capital cost Cost_EC and payback period PBP_EC: Cost_EC = P_PV * UC_PV + I_HP * UC_HP + I_EV * UC_EVCS, PBP_EC = Cost_EC / (Pay_EC_0 - Pay_EC)
Step 18: Compute direct PV self-consumption profile: Gu_EC_t = np.minimum(C_EC_t + C_i_t.sum(axis=1), G_EC_t + G_i_t.sum(axis=1))
Step 19: Compute baseline CO2 emissions: CO2_EC_0 = sum_t(C_EC_t + CP_i_t.sum(axis=1)) * EF_el + sum_i(sum_t(Q_H_i_t / 0.9)) * EF_H + m * (km_365 / 100) * fuel_cons * EF_T

Step 20: Compute sector carbon reductions: delta_CO2_H = I_HP * (CH_i_t.sum() * COP * EF_H - np.maximum(0, CH_i_t - I_ind_cov * (G_i_t + G_sh_t)).sum() * EF_el), delta_CO2_EV = I_EV * (m * (km_365 / 100) * fuel_cons * EF_T - np.maximum(0, CEV_i_t - I_ind_cov * (G_i_t + G_sh_t)).sum() * EF_el)
Step 21: Compute aggregate carbon emission savings: delta_CO2 = sum_t(G_EC_t + G_i_t.sum(axis=1) - CEV_i_t.sum(axis=1) - CH_i_t.sum(axis=1)) * EF_el + delta_CO2_H + delta_CO2_EV
Step 22: Compute metric CS_EC: CS_EC = ((Pay_EC_0 - Pay_EC) / Pay_EC_0) * 100
Step 23: Compute metric GDI_EC: GDI_EC = (D_EC_t.sum() / (C_EC_t.sum() + C_i_t.sum().sum())) * 100
Step 24: Compute metric SCI_EC: SCI_EC = (Gu_EC_t.sum() / (G_EC_t.sum() + G_i_t.sum().sum())) * 100
Step 25: Compute metric SSI_EC: SSI_EC = (Gu_EC_t.sum() / (C_EC_t.sum() + C_i_t.sum().sum())) * 100
Step 26: Compute Jain's fairness index: normalized_share = VS_i / (G_i_t.sum(axis=0) + G_sh_t.sum(axis=0)), FI_EC = (1 / m) * ((normalized_share.sum())**2 / (normalized_share**2).sum()) * 100
Step 27: Compute metric CO2_red_index: CO2_red_index = (delta_CO2 / CO2_EC_0) * 100
Step 28: Compute ultimate score rating f_EC: f_EC = omega_1 * FI_EC + omega_2 * CS_EC + omega_3 * SSI_EC + omega_4 * SCI_EC - omega_5 * GDI_EC + omega_6 * (1 / PBP_EC) * 100 + omega_7 * CO2_red_index
validation_checks: Ensure load and generation input columns are non-empty and have identical shape dimensions (Timesteps x Members).
Check that temperature input matches the number of timesteps.
Verify that ToU and FiT tariff sequences have lengths aligned with the DataFrame timestep index.
Enforce non-zero yield coefficients to prevent division by zero in PV sizing.
Validate that payback calculations use a positive denominator to avoid undefined returns in non-saving scenario designs.
